title: dactylorhiza × sivasiana
intro: Dactylorhiza × sivasiana, also known as Sivas' Spotted Orchid, is a hybrid orchid species created by the cross-pollination of Dactylorhiza saccifera and Dactylorhiza romana. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties due to the presence of flavonoids and phenolic compounds, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Dactylorhiza × sivasiana include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. In herbal preparations, the plant is typically used in teas, infusions, or tinctures, although more research is needed to fully understand its effects and proper uses.
